name: ai-agents-for-minecraft
description: Operate and extend AI-powered Minecraft Paper servers with autonomous builders, server helpers, in-game command coaching, and Codex guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Run AI Minecraft servers and guide players
interface.longDescription: Use this plugin to help Codex install, launch, upgrade, and operate Minecraft Paper servers with AI builder workflows, recurring build jobs, local server tooling, and in-game guidance for commands like WorldEdit, claims, and AI building.
defaultPrompt: Find my Paper server and install the AI builder plugin
Launch my local Minecraft server and verify the AI agent commands work
Add a new AI builder feature to my Minecraft server plugin
Explain this Minecraft command error and tell me what to try next
